name: backend-cybersecurity-portfolio
description: Monorepo de portafolio con Astro y Express

scripts.dev: npx --yes pnpm run dev --prefix frontend & npx --yes pnpm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.build: npx --yes pnpm run build --prefix frontend && node --check backend/src/server.js
scripts.build:hostinger: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=448 npx --yes pnpm run build --prefix frontend
